items.title: Ukraine and Russia ravaged by 4 years of full-scale war without an ending in sight
items.description: After another year of talks, a war-ending deal remains frustratingly elusive.

items.title: WATCH:  Dog abandoned at Las Vegas Airport finds forever home
items.description: ABC News' Danny New reports on the heartbreaking story that finished with a happy ending for a 2-year-old goldendoodle who found his forever home.

items.title: WATCH:  Russia cripples Ukraine’s energy system in the midst of a brutal winter
items.description: ABC News’ Ian Pannell reports on the unrelenting Russian attacks on Ukrainian soil and how it's left the young and vulnerable without water or heat du...

items.title: Russell Brand due in court on further rape, sexual assault charges
items.description: Russell Brand is due in court on rape and sexual assault charges, which were issued to him in December 2025.

items.title: WATCH:  Massive fire triggers bridge collapse in Lincoln, Nebraska
items.description: The bridge is primarily used for freight trains. No word on the cause of the blaze.
